productMigrationProgram: Application shell and canonical workspace geometry

deferredCapabilities.deferredCapability: Comprehensive TanStack Vue Query server-state architecture and general QueryClient policy/query-key framework.
General repository abstraction, DTO/domain repository layering, and product-wide normalized API policy.
Comprehensive environment and runtime-configuration architecture beyond active real-feature needs.
Comprehensive security-runtime architecture and security-header program.
Comprehensive global error, feedback, notification, loading, and query/persistence error framework.
Comprehensive accessibility foundation and product-wide accessibility remediation.
Comprehensive foundation preview and broad final cross-feature browser-integration closure.
Generalized UI adapter, icon, overlay stacking, focus-trap, and scroll-lock framework beyond the F3D provider minimum.
Comprehensive Dexie schema, migration, hydration, reset, logout, quota, unavailable-storage, and cross-tab persistence framework.
Generalized responsive, panel, splitter, safe-area, overlay, and ResizeObserver layout framework not required by the current product slice.
Generalized motion framework, timing scale, GSAP cleanup policy, cancellation, and reduced-motion consolidation.
